label: FederalAuthority
name: Secretary of HHS
description: The authority prescribing regulations to carry out the purposes of section 290dd-2

label: Patient
name: Patient
description: Individual receiving SUD treatment who retains rights under 45 CFR 164.522

label: Part2Program
name: Part 2 Program
description: A federally assisted program or entity providing SUD diagnosis, treatment, or referral

label: CoveredEntity
name: Covered Entity
description: A HIPAA-aligned entity that may receive records for treatment, payment, or operations

label: BusinessAssociate
name: Business Associate
description: An entity working with a covered entity that may receive records

label: QualifiedServiceOrganization
name: Qualified Service Organization
description: A person providing services to a Part 2 program under a written agreement

label: Intermediary
name: Intermediary
description: Entity that receives records under a general designation to disclose to member participants

label: LawfulHolder
name: Lawful Holder
description: An entity that legally receives protected information downstream

label: ThirdPartyPayer
name: Third-Party Payer
description: An entity funding health plans that may be designated as a recipient

label: InvestigativeAgency
name: Investigative Agency
description: Agency seeking records via specialized court order for legal or criminal investigations

label: MedicalPersonnel
name: Medical Personnel
description: Personnel permitted to receive disclosures during a medical emergency

label: CentralRegistry
name: Central Registry
description: Registry that tracks specific patient treatment data
